SEARCH
Package com.boschrexroth.api

Interface SubscriptionPropertiesBuilder

public interface SubscriptionPropertiesBuilder
This module provides helper classes to deal with subscriptionproperties flatbuffers.

    • addSampling

      SubscriptionPropertiesBuilder addSampling(comm.datalayer.SamplingT rule)
      add property sampling 
      
  SamplingT s = new SamplingT();
  s.setSamplingInterval(987654321L);
  builder.addSampling(s);
      Parameters:
      rule - ASamplingT
      Returns:
      A SubscriptionPropertiesBuilder this

    • addQueueing

      SubscriptionPropertiesBuilder addQueueing(comm.datalayer.QueueingT rule)
      add property queueing 
      
  QueueingT q = new QueueingT();
  q.setQueueSize(13L);
  q.setBehaviour(QueueBehaviour.DiscardNewest);
  builder.addQueueing(q);
      Parameters:
      rule - AQueueingT
      Returns:
      A SubscriptionPropertiesBuilder this

    • addDataChangeFilter

      SubscriptionPropertiesBuilder addDataChangeFilter(comm.datalayer.DataChangeFilterT rule)
      add property datachangefilter 
      
  DataChangeFilterT f = new DataChangeFilterT();
  f.setDeadBandValue(3.14f);
  builder.addDataChangeFilter(f);
      Parameters:
      rule - ADataChangeFilterT
      Returns:
      A SubscriptionPropertiesBuilder this

    • addChangeEvents

      SubscriptionPropertiesBuilder addChangeEvents(comm.datalayer.ChangeEventsT rule)
      add property changeevents 
      
  ChangeEventsT e = new ChangeEventsT();
  e.setValueChange(2);
  e.setMetadataChange(true);
  e.setBrowselistChange(true);
  e.setConnectionChange(true);
  builder.addChangeEvents(e);
      Parameters:
      rule - AChangeEventsT
      Returns:
      A SubscriptionPropertiesBuilder this

    • addCounting

      SubscriptionPropertiesBuilder addCounting(comm.datalayer.CountingT rule)
      add property counting 
      
  CountingT c = new CountingT();
  c.setCountSubscriptions(true);
  builder.addCounting(c);
      Parameters:
      rule - ACountingT
      Returns:
      A SubscriptionPropertiesBuilder this

  rl.setRateLimit(123L);
  builder.addLosslessRateLimit(rl);
      Parameters:
      rule - ALosslessRateLimitT

      A SubscriptionPropertiesBuilder this

  LosslessIntervalT ri = new LosslessIntervalT();
  ri.setSamplingInterval(456L);
  ri.setTolerance(5L);
  builder.addLosslessRateInterval(ri);
      Parameters:
      rule - ALosslessIntervalT
      Returns:
      A SubscriptionPropertiesBuilder this

      Creator of a SubscriptionPropertiesBuilder instance
